claim: Claude Code is infinitely programmable: call LLM via Claude-P with custom prompt and allowed tools list (edit, write, bash, create, read)
actionable: Use Claude-P(prompt, tools=['edit','write','bash','read']) to script AI workflows; enables arbitrary tool calling beyond single code edits.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: AI coding is single tool call (write code); agentic coding is superset: includes file search (glob, grep, ls), reading, writing, bash, batch tool calls
actionable: Move beyond single-turn code generation: use agentic patterns to search codebase, read files for context, write multiple files, run bash commands, parallelize with batch.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Claude Code's bash tool enables LLM to act like terminal user: run any bash command, enabling CI/CD, git workflows, and arbitrary shell operations
actionable: Enable bash tool in Claude Code; use for git workflows, running tests, executing scripts, CI/CD automation, package management without human intervention.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Batch tool allows Claude Code to run multiple tool calls in parallel, enabling sub-agent patterns for massive engineering work throughput
actionable: Use batch tool: spawn parallel Claude Code instances for reviews, testing, or multi-step workflows; get exponential throughput gains from tool parallelization.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Claude Code supports arbitrary MCP server integration: can call Notion tools, file APIs, and custom tools defined via MCP protocol
actionable: Set up MCP servers (Notion, custom APIs); Claude Code can call them alongside built-in tools for cross-domain automation (code + knowledge + external APIs).
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Claude Code is programmable agentic tool: embed in Python scripts, CLI tools, or agents; unlike Cursor/Windsurf, enables automation and composition
actionable: Build CLIs and agents that call Claude Code programmatically; treat it as composable component in larger automation workflows, not just IDE.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Stack multiple Claude Code instances for complex workflows: one instance generates code, another reviews, third handles DevOps—divide and conquer
actionable: For large refactors or multi-phase work, orchestrate multiple Claude Code agents: implementer, reviewer, tester, documenter—compose via Python or orchestration layer.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Embed Claude Code into AI agents for exponential compute scaling; run agentic workflows with multiple specialized Claude Code instances
actionable: Build multi-agent systems with Claude Code as composable component; orchestrate via LLM agents to coordinate work across repos and domains.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Parsing CLI arguments into Claude Code prompts enables dynamic workflows: pass task name as CLI arg, Claude Code executes varied workflows
actionable: Build parameterized scripts: read CLI args, inject into Claude Code prompt, execute varied workflows; enables single script to handle multiple tasks.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE

claim: Planning via detailed specs (Notion pages) + Claude Code execution creates reusable workflows: define task as spec, run repeatedly on many codebases
actionable: Use Notion as planning docs; store task specs there; have Claude Code read and execute against specs; enables one-time planning, repeated automated execution.
source_title: AI Coding is NOT ENOUGH: Claude Code's NEXT LEVEL Agentic Coding FEATURE
